title: senecio antitensis
intro: Senecio antitensis, also known as Groundsel bush or New Zealand groundsel, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It is a member of the daisy family and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Senecio antitensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
